sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15131" key="a)ristopo/seia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστο-πόσεια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (πόσις᾽ νύμφη</foreign> wife <sense id="n15131.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a noble husband,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
